title: Virtual Annual Meeting October 3
summary: The 2020 Koniag Annual Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for October 3, 2020 will be held virtually due to the COVID-19 pandemic. To watch the virtual webcast on the day of the meeting, log in to the My Koniag Shareholder portal at https://mykoniag.koniag.com to access the link. The meeting will beg...
